title: Dogs Better Forge
description: This mod just adds some more armor, tools, food and maybe more.
body:
Embark on an enhanced Minecraft journey with our feature-packed mod! Introducing an array of new tools, from mighty hammers to versatile armor, delightful new food items, luminescent blocks, log slabs, and a treasure trove of additional content to enrich your gameplay experience.



🔨 Forge new paths with innovative tools!

🛡️ Suit up in powerful armor sets!

🍔 Enjoy a feast of new food varieties!

✨ Illuminate your builds with glowing blocks!

🌲 Discover log slabs for creative construction!



Go to my youtube to comment suggestions [ItzDogo](https://www.youtube.com/@itzdogo)

Or join my discord to add suggestions [The Dog House 2.0](https://discord.com/invite/vHBHd6T6xf)

If you want to fabric version of the mod [click here](https://modrinth.com/mod/dogs-better-fabric)

IT HAS COME TO MY ATTENTION THAT SOMETHING IN MY MOD IS THE SAME AS OTHER MODS, ASWELL AS THE CRAFTING RECIPES. IF YOU WOULD LIKE TO BE ABLE TO CHOOSE WHAT MOD YOU GET THINGS FROM PLEASE DOWNLOAD THIS MOD FOR YOUR RESPECTED VERION: [https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph)

Buy Me A Coffee <3 - https://www.buymeacoffee.com/itzdogo <3
